line_technical_records.default_mixing_ratio: 1:1.5 (1 part ChromaSilk Creme Color : 1.5 parts ChromaSilk Creme Developer)
line_technical_records.processing_time_ranges: 30 minutes — up to 45 minutes (printed on product pages)
line_technical_records.gray_coverage_rules: Up to 100% gray coverage (printed Features on product pages)
line_technical_records.tone_family_legend: 12 tonal families; per-family descriptions on product pages (e.g., Ash Family: cool green base)
line_technical_records.special_usage_notes: 3 oz tube; 1:1.5 mixing ratio yields 7.5 oz working product (printed on product pages)
assumptions: Developer volume by desired result not on mixing-ratio landing page.
data_gaps: Full digit tone legend in pro-gated Product Knowledge Guide PDF; family descriptions used from public product pages.

line_technical_records.default_mixing_ratio: 1:1.5 (1 part Express Tones : 1.5 parts ChromaSilk Zero Lift Creme Developer)
line_technical_records.developer_strengths_if_stated: Zero Lift only (printed on product pages)
line_technical_records.processing_time_ranges: 5 minutes or less (printed on product pages)
line_technical_records.tone_family_legend: Blondes and Brunettes series; bases stated per shade (e.g., Ash: cool/green base)
line_technical_records.special_usage_notes: Apply to damp hair; Express Tones Clear may be added (Ash product page)
line_technical_records.source_document: ChromaSilk Express Tones Ash product page
assumptions: Line-level rules from representative Express Tones pages applied per collection.

line_technical_records.processing_time_ranges: 20–30 minutes on several shade pages; not uniform across collection
line_technical_records.lift_rules: No lift; pre-lightening required for vivid deposit on natural hair
line_technical_records.tone_family_legend: Named direct dyes (no level/tone digit system)
line_technical_records.special_usage_notes: No developer; intermixable across VIVIDS shades
assumptions: Original, Neons, Pastels grouped under canonical VIVIDS line per Stage 1 inventory.
data_gaps: Processing time varies by shade page.
